lora._target_modules_choice: Either an explicit list of module-name suffixes (below), or the literal string 'all-linear'. 'all-linear' is Google's canonical Gemma 4 recipe — PEFT regex-matches every linear layer in the language backbone and skips Gemma 4's vision/audio `Gemma4ClippableLinear` wrappers automatically. The explicit list is more transparent about what's being trained but requires the ClippableLinear nn.Linear monkey-patch in sft_modal.py to be safe.
lora._ensure_weight_tying_explanation: Gemma 4 ships with embed_tokens and lm_head tied. Listing both in modules_to_save makes both fully trainable; without ensure_weight_tying=true the two would drift apart during training and the merged model would generate degraded text. Requires PEFT >= 0.19.0.
